title: Digital Fortress: Punjab Police's High-Tech War Against Gangsters
description: Punjab Police has shifted towards intelligence-led policing to counter organized crime, using advanced digital tools like the Punjab Artificial Intelligence System to track gang networks. The use of technology alongside traditional methods aims to prevent violence and dismantle criminal operations before they escalate.
content:
In Punjab, a cutting-edge operations room hums with data, as officers harness technology to combat organized crime. Within this high-tech hub, digital tools converge with field intelligence to pre-empt gang violence, experts disclosed on Tuesday.

title: Sussex man spared jail over AI child sex images and Grok app
description: A man serving a suspended sentence over artificial intelligence (AI) images of child sexual abuse has been warned by a judge he has escaped prison…
content:

content:

title: Amazon targeting $37 billion to $42 billion in bond sale: Report
description: Amazon is planning a massive bond sale, aiming for $37 billion to $42 billion. This significant fundraising effort is to support its extensive investments in artificial intelligence infrastructure. The company is offering bonds in both dollars and euros. This move follows similar large bond issuances by other major tech companies. Investors are showing strong interest in these high-grade corporate debts.

title: OpenAI acquires Promptfoo to secure AI agents as the next security battleground emerges
description: OpenAI is moving deeper into the security layer of artificial intelligence. The company said Monday it has acquired the cybersecurity startup Promptfoo, a developer platform for testing and safeguarding AI systems. Terms of the deal were not disclosed. Promptfoo’s team will join OpenAI, and its technology will be integrated into the company’s Frontier platform for AI

title: What is a Transformer in artificial intelligence, and why is it the base of most modern AI models?
description: Transformer in Artificial Intelligence powers over 90% of modern AI models today. Introduced by researchers at Google in 2017, the Transformer architecture changed machine learning forever. It helps AI models understand context, analyze massive datasets, and predict words using probability. Large systems like ChatGPT rely on this design. Training uses trillions of text tokens and human feedback. That is why Transformer-based large language models dominate generative AI, search, and automation today.
content:
